word: G1098 - γλεῦκος - gleûkos - glyoo'-kos - New wine

sections.paragraph:
- Original: γλεῦκος

- Transliteration: Gleukos

- Phonetic: glyoo'-kos

- Definition:

1. the sweet juice pressed the grape, sweet wine

- Origin: akin to G1099

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Neuter

- Strong's: Akin to G1099; sweet wine that is (properly) must (fresh juice) but used of the more saccharine (and therefore highly inebriating) fermented wine: - new wine.
